CheckTitle: PostgreSQL flexible server has geo-redundant backup enabled
Description: **Azure PostgreSQL Flexible Server** is evaluated for **geo-redundant backup**. Geo-redundant backup stores copies in a paired Azure region, enabling cross-region disaster recovery.
Risk: Without geo-redundant backup, a regional disaster causes **permanent data loss**. Locally redundant backups only protect against storage hardware failures within the same region.

Code.Other:
1. Sign in to Azure portal
2. Go to Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible servers
3. Select the server
4. Go to Settings > Backup and restore
5. Enable Geo-redundant backup
6. Click Save
Note: Geo-redundant backup can only be set during server creation for some tiers.
